summary: Completed comprehensive testing of DioCreations CMS Homepage Features (iteration 4). All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend homepage matches LIVE site design with light background, left text, right image layout. Admin Homepage Manager now has 6 tabs (Hero, Colors, Featured, Stats, Sections, Order). New features tested: hero_image field in variants, section ordering with up/down arrows, Italy returns EUR for geo-currency.
passed_tests: Homepage content API (/api/homepage/content) returns all required fields
Hero variants structure correct with hero_image field
Hero image displays and rotates with hero variants
Color schemes structure correct with 5 color options (Violet, Blue, Teal, Pink, Orange)
Color accent rotation works (changes badge/gradient colors on refresh)
Stats section displays 3 stats (Projects Completed, Happy Clients, Years Experience)
Featured blog posts returned from API
Featured products returned with currency conversion
Geo-based currency: India returns INR (rate: 90.5)
Geo-based currency: Germany returns EUR (rate: 1.0)
Geo-based currency: USA returns USD (rate: 1.08)
Geo-based currency: UK returns GBP
Geo-based currency: Italy returns EUR (rate: 1.0)
Homepage content with X-Country-Code: IN returns INR prices
Admin homepage settings API requires authentication (401)
Admin hero variants API requires authentication (401)
Admin color schemes API requires authentication (401)
Admin featured items API requires authentication (401)
Admin users API requires authentication (401)
Services API returns 6 services
Products API returns products with pricing
Portfolio API returns featured projects
Blog API returns published posts
Testimonials API returns testimonials
Homepage loads with dynamic hero section (light bg, left text, right image)
Hero badge text displays correctly
Hero image displays from hero_image field
Hero CTA buttons (Get Started, View Services) clickable
Stats section visible with 3 stats
Services section displays 6 service cards
Products section displays products with EUR currency (€14.46, €1.87, €33)
Blog section displays 3 blog cards with images
Portfolio section displays featured projects
Testimonials section visible
CTA section 'Ready to Transform Your Business?' visible with gradient
Admin login with email/password works
Admin Homepage Manager page loads with 6 tabs
Hero tab shows hero variant editing with hero_image field
Colors tab shows 5 color scheme options with toggles
Featured tab shows blog/product selection
Stats tab accessible
Sections tab shows 6 visibility toggles
Order tab shows 6 sections with up/down arrows
Section ordering works - moved Products above Services and verified on homepage
Section ordering persists after save
Settings saved toast appears after saving
context_for_next_testing_agent: All homepage features tested and working: 1) Homepage matches LIVE site design (light bg, left text, right image layout) 2) Hero variants include hero_image field that rotates with content 3) Admin Homepage Manager has 6 tabs: Hero, Colors, Featured, Stats, Sections, Order 4) Section ordering works with up/down arrows and persists after save 5) Geo-based currency detection works for IN (INR), US (USD), IT (EUR), DE (EUR), GB (GBP) 6) Color accent rotation changes badge/gradient colors on refresh. Admin login: admin@diocreations.com / adminpassword

features_verified.homepage_design: Working - Light background, left text, right image layout matching LIVE site
features_verified.hero_image_field: Working - hero_image in variants displays and rotates
features_verified.admin_6_tabs: Working - Hero, Colors, Featured, Stats, Sections, Order tabs all functional
features_verified.section_ordering: Working - Up/down arrows reorder sections, changes reflect on homepage
features_verified.section_visibility: Working - 6 toggles for Services, Products, Blog, Portfolio, Testimonials, CTA
features_verified.geo_currency_italy: Working - Italy (IT) returns EUR with rate 1.0
features_verified.color_rotation: Working - Different accent colors on page refresh
features_verified.featured_selection: Working - Blog posts and products can be selected as featured
